description: This file contains SCSS mixins for styling button variants, outline variants, and sizes, used to generate consistent button styles with different states and sizes in a web project.

methods.name: button-variant
methods.description: Mixin to generate styles for button variants with different states like hover, focus, active, and disabled.

methods.name: button-outline-variant
methods.description: Mixin to generate styles for outlined button variants with different states.

methods.name: button-size
methods.description: Mixin to set padding, font size, and border radius for buttons.
